text: ‘Has ears or tail cut off’; the Hebrew text probably signifies, ‘has an over-developed or an under-developed limb’.

That is, one resident abroad (see verse 18 above). The meaning of the Hebrew text appears to be, ‘If any alien offers one of the things mentioned as bread (i.e. food) for the Lord’; it is not clear whether the sense is that an alien must not (any more than an Israelite) offer any victim which has a blemish, or that no alien may offer ox, sheep, or goat in sacrifice.
